item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path

data = json.loads(Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json').read_text())
print(f'schema_version={data[\"schema_version\"]} type={type(data[\"schema_version\"]).__name__}')
print(f'max_parallel={data[\"max_parallel\"]} type={type(data[\"max_parallel\"]).__name__}')
assert data['schema_version'] == 2 and type(data['schema_version']) is int
assert data['max_parallel'] == 3 and type(data['max_parallel']) is int
print('RESULT=PASS')
PY"
